settings.title: We Are Now Booking Q3 Projects
settings.excerpt: Our build calendar opens for July starts, and the earliest slots tend to go to the projects we scope first.
settings.body:
We keep our project list short on purpose. Two or three builds at a time means the team that scopes your site is the same team that ships it.

July and August are open now. A typical engagement starts with a one week discovery sprint, where we map your pages, content, and the third party tools you actually use day to day.

How a Q3 build runs

After discovery we move into design and build, usually over four to six weeks depending on the size of the site. We share work in progress as we go, so nothing about the final result is a surprise.

  • Week one is discovery, where we map pages, content, and tools.
  • The middle weeks are design and build, with regular check-ins.
  • The final week is testing and handing the site to your team.

If you have a launch date in mind, tell us early. The work that happens before the first line of code is what keeps the later weeks calm.

Booking the early slots

The first July slots tend to go to the projects we scope first, because a clear brief is easy to schedule. If your content and goals are already settled, you can usually claim an earlier start.

Reach out with a sentence or two about the site you need. Even if July fills, knowing your timeline lets us hold the right window in the autumn rather than scrambling later.
